blocks.text: Match preview: Anurag Nalgonda Knights face Palamuru Strikers in 15th Match (T20) on Mon, 29 Jun, 2026, 2:15 pm at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium Hyderabad. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Anurag Nalgonda Knights vs Palamuru Strikers

blocks.text: Balanced wicket; black soil offers turn as match progresses.
Thunderstorm · High 32°C / Low 24°C · Rain: 5.4 mm · Wind: up to 15 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
